parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: notificationifexists
parameters.label: Notification if Attribute Exists
parameters.description: Whether to display a notification if the attribute already exists on the input.

parameters.name: overrideifexists
parameters.label: Override if Attribute Exists
parameters.description: When on, overrides an input attribute if a new attribute created by this has the same name.

parameters.name: premultcolor
parameters.label: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.description: Enable RGB values pre-multiplication with the Alpha.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Choose to create a predefined attribute or a custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0customname
parameters.label: Custom Name
parameters.description: The name of the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the type.

parameters.name: attr0numcomps
parameters.label: Number of Components
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0isarray
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Attribute is an array, for example 5 float3 values is an array of size 5.

parameters.name: attr0arraysize
parameters.label: Array Size
parameters.description: Nunber of elements in the array.

parameters.name: ren
parameters.label: Rename Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to rename attributes.

parameters.name: ren0from
parameters.label: From Attribute
parameters.description: The attribute to rename.

parameters.name: ren0to
parameters.label: To Attribute
parameters.description: Sets the new attribute name.

parameters.name: dup
parameters.label: Duplicate Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to duplicate attributes.

parameters.name: dup0name
parameters.label: Duplicate  Attribute
parameters.description: Name of attribute to duplicate.

parameters.name: dup0new
parameters.label: New Attribute Name
parameters.description: Name of new attribute being duplicated.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: attr0value3
parameters.label: Attr0Value3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mat0isarray
parameters.label: Mat0Isarray
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mat0arraysize
parameters.label: Mat0Arraysize
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mat0numrows
parameters.label: Mat0Numrows
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mat0name
parameters.label: Mat0Name
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mat0qualifier
parameters.label: Mat0Qualifier
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mat0numcols
parameters.label: Mat0Numcols
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
